backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all data stores, types, and public API for vendors, products, orders, reviews, reward campaigns, projects, user profiles, and Stripe integration, with access control enforced throughout.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that declares all shared data types and a no-op `run` function passing the old actor state directly to the new actor state.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping four rating/review display features to their target frontend files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Concise per-file summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key implementation details of each component, page, hook, and utility.
frontend/EXECUTION_PLAN.md: Staged development checklist tracking completed and planned work across 11 stages, from project setup through vendor ratings and reviews.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark modes, including colors for backgrounds, borders, charts, and sidebar.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that sets the page title to 'CitizensCo CAppStores' and mounts the React app via `/src/main.tsx`.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app component that defines all TanStack Router routes (marketplace, wallet, rewards, vendor, admin, etc.) within a shared Header/Footer layout, and shows a loading spinner while Internet Identity initializes.
frontend/src/components/AddDAppModal.tsx: Modal dialog form for submitting a new DApp entry (name, description, URL, category, logo) to the backend via the useAddProjectEntry mutation, with logo file upload and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Tabbed admin dashboard displaying aggregate analytics (views, clicks, DApp count), detailed per-project analytics, and sub-panels for revenue, wallets, rewards, advertising, and system health.
frontend/src/components/CreateRewardCamp: Modal form for creating a new reward campaign with fields for name, description, campaign type (airdrop, referral, etc.), and reward amount in ICP, submitted via the useCreateRewardCampaign mutation.
frontend/src/components/DAppCard.tsx: Card component that displays a DApp's name, description, view/click counts, and a Launch button; tracks views on mount and clicks on button press via backend mutations.
Static marketing section rendering four feature cards (Analytics, Payments, AI Recommendations, Ads) with icons and descriptions for the landing page.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple site footer with a copyright notice, a caffeine.ai attribution link, and About/Docs/Support anchor links.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Renders the app header with navigation links, theme toggle, and login/logout via Internet Identity. Shows different nav items based on authentication state and admin role.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Displays a static hero banner with a headline, description, and feature badges for the decentralized app marketplace landing page.
frontend/src/components/OrderConfirmatio: Modal dialog that shows a summary of a successfully placed order including product, vendor, quantity, total ICP, and status, with options to continue shopping or view orders.
frontend/src/components/OrderDetailDialo: Modal dialog that displays detailed information about a specific order fetched from the orders query, including status, product, vendor, customer, and amount.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Card component displaying a product's name, description, price in ICP, stock status, and a quantity selector with an order button for authenticated users.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog that prompts new users to enter a display name and optional email to create their profile, with validation and error handling.
frontend/src/components/RecommendationsP: Displays an AI-powered recommendations panel that scores and ranks up to 3 DApp projects based on view/click analytics and user profile, then renders them as cards with launch tracking.
frontend/src/components/RevenueDashboard: Renders a revenue dashboard with summary metric cards (total revenue, payouts, active configs) and a per-DApp breakdown table using mostly mock calculations.
frontend/src/components/RevenueShareConf: A dialog modal for creating revenue share configurations, allowing admins to add participants with Principal or Stripe IDs and percentage splits that must total 100%.
frontend/src/components/StripeSetupModal: A self-managing dialog modal that auto-opens for admins when Stripe is not yet configured, collecting a secret key and allowed countries to save via the backend.
An input component that supports both typed text and browser-based speech recognition, submitting the resulting text via an onSubmit callback.
frontend/src/components/vendor/MyProduct: Displays a vendor's product list with loading skeletons, empty state, and per-product cards showing name, description, price in ICP, and stock status. Accepts an optional callback to trigger adding a new product.
frontend/src/components/vendor/VendorCat: A controlled input component for managing a list of category tags, supporting comma-separated entry, keyboard navigation, autocomplete suggestions, duplicate detection, and removal of existing categories.
frontend/src/components/vendor/VendorOnb: Renders a step-by-step onboarding checklist card for new vendors, tracking completion of creating a vendor account and adding a first product; hides itself once all steps are complete.
frontend/src/components/vendor/VendorPro: A form component that collects product name, description, price (ICP), and stock quantity, then submits a new Product record via the useCreateProduct mutation with validation and toast feedback.
frontend/src/components/vendor/VendorRev: Displays a vendor's reviews with star ratings, relative timestamps, and truncated principal IDs, and provides an interactive star-selector form for authenticated users to submit new reviews.
frontend/src/components/VendorCard.tsx: A clickable card component that displays a vendor's name, star rating summary, bio, and category badges, fetching rating data via a query hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using TanStack Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries whenever the Internet Identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useDebouncedValue.ts: A generic React hook that returns a debounced version of a given value, only updating after a configurable delay (default 300ms) has elapsed without further changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state, identity persistence via AuthClient, and exposing status flags like isLoggingIn and isLoginSuccess.
frontend/src/hooks/useMyVendorProducts.t: Custom hook that filters all products from useListProducts to return only those belonging to a given vendor ID, along with loading/error state and a hasProducts flag.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for backend interactions, including user profiles, admin checks, projects, analytics, reward campaigns, products, orders, vendors, Stripe config, and reviews.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Tailwind CSS directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme design tokens (colors, radius, sidebar, charts).
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/DiscoveryHubPage.tsx: Page component that displays AI-scored trending, emerging, and leaderboard DApps using project entries and analytics data, requiring authentication to view.
frontend/src/pages/GlobalDashboardPage.t: Authenticated dashboard page that aggregates platform-wide metrics including views, clicks, reward campaigns, and ad revenue into a unified analytics display.
frontend/src/pages/MarketplacePage.tsx: Main marketplace page that lists, searches, and sorts DApp project entries, with support for adding DApps, admin panel access, profile setup prompts, and view tracking.
frontend/src/pages/OrdersPage.tsx: Displays a paginated table of the authenticated user's orders with status badges, and opens an OrderDetailDialog when a row is clicked. Shows login prompt if unauthenticated or a loading spinner while fetching.
frontend/src/pages/RewardsPage.tsx: Shows reward campaigns in a tabbed UI with join/complete actions, skeleton loading states, and per-campaign type icons and color coding. Uses hooks to fetch campaigns and user profile, and handles join/complete mutations with toast notifications.
frontend/src/pages/ShopPage.tsx: Renders a searchable, vendor-filterable product grid that lets authenticated users place orders, showing an OrderConfirmationDialog on success. Combines product and vendor data with local search/filter state.
frontend/src/pages/VendorDirectoryPage.t: Displays a searchable, filterable, and sortable directory of public vendors with URL-synced query params and per-vendor rating collection via hidden collector components. Renders VendorCard components for each filtered result.
frontend/src/pages/VendorPage.tsx: Full vendor dashboard for the authenticated user, supporting vendor registration, profile editing, product management, order status updates, balance withdrawal, and reviews display via tabbed sections.
frontend/src/pages/VendorStorePage.tsx: Displays a public vendor store page with the vendor's products, rating summary, and reviews, and allows authenticated users to place orders via a confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/pages/WalletPage.tsx: Renders the wallet management page showing ICP and Stripe balances, deposit/withdrawal forms, and transaction history.
frontend/src/types.ts: Defines frontend-only TypeScript interfaces and re-exports backend types for analytics, wallet, vendor, product, order, and review data structures.
frontend/src/utils/categoryText.ts: Provides utility functions for normalizing, comparing, parsing, and filtering vendor category strings in a case-insensitive, whitespace-tolerant manner.
frontend/src/utils/errors.ts: Exports a single helper function that extracts a human-readable error message from various error types including IC agent rejection objects.
frontend/src/utils/profileValidation.ts: Provides validation functions and constants for user profile name and email fields, matching backend length and format constraints.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/src/utils/vendorDiscovery.ts: Provides pure utility functions for searching, filtering by category, sorting, and extracting unique categories from a list of vendor objects.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, accordion animations, and enabling the typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the current project state (version 3) for CitizensCo CAppStores, listing four completed frontend features around vendor rating display/sorting and one pending backend task (AR-3) to add a dedicated vendor rating summary query.
